---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us fix an issue with YouTube Dislike Preview
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

> **Note**: If English isn't your first language, feel free to describe the issue in your own language — that's fine!

### Environment & Context
- **Extension Version**: [e.g. 1.0.2]
- **Chrome Version**: [e.g. Chrome 126.0...]
- **YouTube Locale / Language**: [e.g. en-US, hi-IN, pt-BR, es-ES] *(Since YouTube UI elements differ by language/region, please specify your locale)*
- **Where the issue occurred**:
  - [ ] Homepage
  - [ ] Search results
  - [ ] Watch page
  - [ ] Other (please specify): 

### Description & Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

### Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

### Actual Behavior
A clear description of what actually happened.

### Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem (optional but encouraged).
